_source: tools/dc2_re/gen_gating.py (K78 / ITEMS-KEYITEMS-RE-PLAN Phase 3). Per-room, per-routine flag-dataflow facts from the slot-5 SCD script: tests = op-0x1d GetFlag [group,id]; sets = op-0x1c/op-0x33 SetFlag [group,id,value]; items = op-0x31 SAT-1 {thread('id' byte, K77), routine(param)}; examine = op-0x39 SAT-9 one-shot interactives {routine, thread, oneshot flag(10,id)}; key_use = op-0x3a SAT-10 (use -> SetFlag(8, flag8_id), subtype = equip-class gate scene_mgr+0x10b5 {2,8}->1 {1,7}->2); doors = op-0x30 with the K78 gate fields. dynamic_* counts = non-literal operands the static model cannot resolve.
_locked_doors: every locked door (lock_index != 0) with its unlock flag(8,K) and ALL static unlock sources: key_use records (reach the room + equip-class) or script SetFlag(8,K,1) routines (run when their guard tests pass). Guard flags' own setters are in rooms[].sets — chain via a fixpoint (gen_ap_logic-style flood-fill).
